mapper.select:
SELECT u.id as id, u.id as userId, u.name as name, u.name as firstName, u.name as lastName, u.email as email, u.branch as branch, u.branch as role, u.percentage as percentage, u.phone as phone, u.state_id as stateId FROM users u
AND u.id = #{userId} AND u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{email}, '%') AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{firstName}, '%') AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lastName}, '%') AND u.branch = #{role} AND u.phone = #{phone}

SELECT u.id as id, u.id as userId, u.name as name, u.name as firstName, u.name as lastName, u.email as email, u.branch as branch, u.branch as role, u.percentage as percentage, u.phone as phone, u.state_id as stateId FROM users u WHERE u.id = #{userId}
